# Full book outline

When content is added, each header should become its own document

## -2.1 Frequentist Statistics Review

Focus on Bernoulli

## -2.2 Working with Data in R

## -1.1 Test Statistics & P Values

## 1.1 Command Line I - Working with Files

## 1.2 Data Structures

## 2.1 Bayesian Approach to Modeling Hypotheses

## 2.2 Control Flow, Functions and Loops

## 3.1 Two Sample Poisson Comparison

## 3.2 Debugging Tools

## 4.1 Univariate Linear Models

## 4.2 Writing Readable Code

## 5.1 Causal Inference, Study Design

## 5.2 Project Structure

## 6.1 Non Gaussian (GLMM)

## 6.2 Software Valication

## 7.1 Heirarchical Models

## 7.2 Git I (Tracking Your Changes)

## 8.1 ZIPs, Info Criteria

## 8.2 Stats Other Paths

## X.1 Unsupervised Models

## X.2 Stats - Other Paths
